about.title: A divine mission, a real impact
about.intro: LiFAC (Light For All Center) is a non-profit organization gathering Christians from various churches committed to a ministry of evangelism and humanitarian action.
about.longIntro: LiFAC is more than an organization, it's a movement dedicated to spiritual awakening and the training of impactful Christian leaders. We believe in a living faith, manifested by a burning passion for Christ and concrete action in society.
about.slogan: A generation on fire for Jesus-Christ.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To see all nations enlightened and transformed by the light of the Gospel of Jesus-Christ through the power of the Holy Spirit.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To promote the message of Jesus-Christ through evangelistic events and humanitarian initiatives, encouraging unity and collaboration of the body of Christ.

passion.title: PASSION
passion.desc: Spreading the fire of the Gospel through every city and every village.

spirit.title: HOLY SPIRIT
spirit.desc: Being led by the power of the Holy Spirit to transform hearts.

impact.title: IMPACT
impact.desc: Becoming living witnesses to the ends of the earth.

integrity.title: INTEGRITY
integrity.desc: Living in accordance with the Word of God at all times.

excellence.title: EXCELLENCE
excellence.desc: Giving the best for the Kingdom of God.

compassion.title: COMPASSION
compassion.desc: Responding to the needs of those who suffer.

unity.title: UNITY
unity.desc: Collaborating with the body of Christ without barriers.

about.verse: "Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father, the Son and the Holy Spirit."

activities.title: We go where souls need light

crusades.title: Crusades
crusades.desc: Powerful crusades to proclaim Christ and impact thousands of lives.

evangelism.title: Evangelism
evangelism.desc: Street, campus and market outreach to reach every soul.

humanitarian.title: Humanitarian Actions
humanitarian.desc: Support for orphans, the sick and communities in need.

prayer.title: Prayer Vigils
prayer.desc: Nights of prayer and worship for the grace and power of the Holy Spirit.

training.title: Training & Discipleship
training.desc: Training and equipping leaders for mission and service to God.

events.title: The fire of the Spirit in action
events.subtitle: Experience moments of glory, training and unprecedented spiritual impact.

crusades.title: CRUSADES
crusades.desc: Mass evangelism to win thousands of souls for Christ.

seminars.title: SEMINARS
seminars.desc: Strategic training to equip tomorrow's leaders.

vigils.title: VIGILS
vigils.desc: Intense intercession for the awakening of nations.

events.readyDesc: Don't miss our next major gathering. Reserve your spot and prepare your heart.
events.infosDesc: Have questions about a specific event or want to organize a tour stop in your city?

testimonies.title: Transformed lives
testimonies.desc: Discover the real impact of our evangelism and humanitarian programs through the stories of those whose lives have been touched.
testimonies.quote: At the LiFAC crusade, I met Jesus-Christ and my life completely changed. Today, I live for Him!

cta.title: GOD CAN USE YOU TO TRANSFORM LIVES!

footer.tagline: LiFAC — Light For All Center. Impacting lives for Christ and illuminating our generation.
footer.rights: © 2025 LiFAC — Light For All Center. All rights reserved.

donate.title: MAKE A DONATION
donate.subtitle: Your generosity is the fuel of the global evangelism mission.
donate.whyDesc: Because every soul saved and every transformed life begins with an act of faith and sharing.
donate.investDesc: Your gifts are not just numbers. They enable the logistics of major crusades, the printing of Bibles and the funding of leadership schools. By contributing, you become a direct partner of the Holy Spirit for the salvation of nations.

card.title: BANK CARD
card.desc: Secure online donation via our international partner platform.

transfer.title: TRANSFER
transfer.desc: For regular or large donations. Bank details available.

mobile.title: MOBILE MONEY
mobile.desc: Simple and fast for Africa. (Orange, MTN, Moov).

rows.benefit: Impact report of the supported project
VIP access to events & Detailed financial report

donate.verse: "Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver."

process.desc: Select the project or general fund.
Determine your gift according to your heart.
Use one of our secure methods.
Receive your confirmation and the impact generated.

donate.changeLifeDesc: Your gift is a seed that will produce an eternal harvest.

campaigns.desc: Support our active humanitarian and missionary projects. Every donation counts.
campaigns.metaDesc: Discover all of LiFAC's active humanitarian and missionary campaigns. Support the ones that resonate with you.
campaigns.noCampaigns: No active campaigns at the moment.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: A Generation on fire for Jesus-Christ
aboutPage.identitySubtitle: League for Information and Training for Christian Action
aboutPage.fieldTrainingDesc: Seminars and ongoing training for leaders.
aboutPage.fieldHumanitarianDesc: Support for orphans and the needy.
aboutPage.joinDesc: Let's ignite this fire for our generation together.

activitiesPage.metaDesc: Discover the 5 pillars of our ministry: school evangelism, market outreach, pop-up crusades, one-on-one evangelism, and large-scale crusades.
activitiesPage.title: Our activities
activitiesPage.subtitle: Five complementary pillars to reach every soul, wherever they may be.
activitiesPage.schoolsDesc: We visit schools to share the Gospel with the younger generation. Through interactive sessions, testimonies, and prayer times, we sow seeds of faith in hearts.
activitiesPage.marketsDesc: Markets are meeting places where we bring the light of the Gospel to traders and passersby. Tract distribution, personal prayer, and authentic exchanges are at the heart of this mission.
activitiesPage.popUpDesc: Targeted and concentrated gatherings (1-2 days) in specific neighborhoods or villages. Ideal for mobilizing a local community around a message of hope.
activitiesPage.oneOnOneDesc: We believe in the power of individual conversations. Our trained evangelists meet people where they are, listen, pray, and accompany each person on their journey.
activitiesPage.crusadesDesc: Our large-scale evangelism events bring together thousands of people for evenings of worship, teaching, prayer, and repentance calls. Moments of collective transformation.
activitiesPage.joinTitle: Do you want to join us?
activitiesPage.joinDesc: Whether you want to participate in an action, support financially, or pray for our work, your commitment makes all the difference.

contactPage.metaDesc: Contact the LiFAC team for any questions, partnerships, or prayer requests.
contactPage.title: Contact us
contactPage.subtitle: A question, a partnership, a prayer request? We are at your disposal.

forms.subject: Subject
forms.success: Message sent! Our team will get back to you shortly.

donationForm.anonymous: I wish for my donation to be publicly anonymous
donationForm.securePayment: Secure payment via FedaPay (MTN, Moov, Card)

eventsPage.title: OUR EVENTS
eventsPage.subtitle: Discover the events marking our generation.
eventsPage.nightDesc: It is LiFAC's flagship event. A whole night dedicated to worship, prophetic word, and miracles.
eventsPage.conquerDesc: Our crusades are strategic field deployments. We transform stadiums and public squares into worship altars, followed by mass baptisms and planting of new local prayer cells.
eventsPage.mobilizationDesc: LiFAC attracts an ever-growing crowd, thirsty for truth and divine power. Our events are not just meetings, but turning points for thousands of lives. Each event is proof of our generation's spiritual hunger.
eventsPage.equipDesc: Beyond emotion, we emphasize instruction. Our seminars train men and women capable of influencing society.
eventsPage.testimony: "I came to the Night of the Holy Spirit in total despair. I left with a clear vision and a peace I had never known. My life literally changed that night."
eventsPage.joinTagline: LiFAC World | Join the Generation on Fire

volunteerPage.title: Become a volunteer
volunteerPage.subtitle: Join the LiFAC team as a volunteer. Put your skills to work for the evangelism and humanitarian mission.
volunteerPage.impactDesc: Your concrete actions truly transform lives in Benin.
volunteerPage.flexibilityDesc: Choose your missions according to your availability, your skills and your personal call.

prayerPage.title: Prayer request
prayerPage.subtitle: Share your prayer request with the LiFAC team. We believe in the power of intercession.
prayerPage.verse: "If two of you on earth agree about anything they ask for, it will be done for them by my Father."
prayerPage.privacy: Our team and community will pray for you. Your information remains confidential if you wish.

auth.loginDesc: Access your donor or volunteer dashboard.
auth.registerDesc: To join LiFAC as a volunteer, partner or registered donor, contact the team.
